address: 5400 W Fayetteville Rd #100, College Park, GA 30349
rating_note: Aggregate star rating only. Birdeye listing title shows 4.5, NiceLocal shows 4.4. A precise review count is intentionally NOT displayed: directory counts conflict (Birdeye title 94 vs Birdeye body 'no reviews yet', BestProsInTown 32-46 on an Ed Chay sub-listing, BusinessYab 3) and no single figure could be reproduced. Booksy shows 4.9 / 356 but only for the 'Ed Chay @ The BarberShop Lounge' individual-barber profile, not the shop as a whole, so it is not asserted as the shop's aggregate.
brand_angle: College Park's lounge-style barbershop where a master fade and a hot-towel shave feel like a private members' club.
tagline: College Park's lounge-style barbershop where a sharp fade comes with real hospitality.

services.title: Signature Men's Haircut & Fade
services.desc: Precision cuts and skin-fade tapers shaped to your face by the lounge's veteran barbers (book Ed Chay, Stu, Snoop or Joel) for a clean, camera-ready finish every visit.

services.title: Beard Sculpt & Line-Up
services.desc: Detailed beard shaping, edge-up and contour work that frames the cut and keeps your look sharp between appointments.

services.title: Hot-Towel Straight-Razor Shave
services.desc: A classic warm-towel, straight-razor shave (and full head shave option) delivered with the relaxed, lounge-club experience the shop is known for.

verified_facts.rating_source: Birdeye listing title (4.5) and NiceLocal (4.4); corroborated directionally across two independent directories
verified_facts.review_count_note: Precise review count omitted during honesty scrub - directory counts conflict and could not be verified to a single number; only the corroborated aggregate star-rating range is asserted.
verified_facts.honesty_scrub: 2026-05-31: removed unstable '94 reviews' count and JSON-LD aggregateRating; replaced hard 4.5 with corroborated 4.4-4.5 range; verified name/address/phone against directory listings; re-checked Birdeye (no reviews body), Fresha (no public rating), BestProsInTown (46, Ed Chay sub-listing) and Booksy (4.9/356, individual-barber profile) live on 2026-05-31.

assets.logo_pipeline: grok image_gen gold barber crest (razor + barber pole on shield, laurel ring, BSL monogram) -> PIL border-flood transparency pass -> true backgroundless PNG, corner alpha 0

self_exec.deliverable: Premium brand + modern site + AI automation (online booking, smart intake, automated reminders, one-tap rebooking)
